creator: ben@FreeBSD.org
text:
jtm63@enteract.com wrote:

> 	In the man page for mkisofs in the section for -print-size
> no indication is given of the units for the number returned. This
> can be confusing. It sure confused me.

Tell the author of mkisofs, not us. mkisofs is not a standard part of
FreeBSD.
